title: RPG Stash
description: Adds an RPG-styled stash (ender chest) to every village, allowing you to safely and conveniently access your valuables on your adventures!
body:
What’s the purpose of this?

- Backpacks often diminish the adventuring experience by removing the need to return to town, encouraging players to hoard items as they progress. Some backpacks even allow carrying an unrealistic number of items. - **RPG Stash** changes this, following the approach of classic hack-and-slash RPGs (eg. Diablo / Torchlight), by providing a stash in every village. This feature pairs well with bundles (or even better with mods that expand the ender chest*) for a more authentic RPG-style item management system.



---

Actually a datapack packed as a mod. Requires Lithostitched.

--- ### Standalone with Vanilla Villages & ### Compatible with [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/project/muf0XoRe) Villages --- ### You can also expand the ender chest with the following Fabric mods: - [Expanded Enderchest](https://modrinth.com/project/Gx7FGKAH) **1.21-1.21.8 & 1.20.1** - [Bigger Ender Chests](https://modrinth.com/project/hWASH58O) **1.21–1.21.5** - [DoubleEnderChest](https://modrinth.com/project/qCZGOoRc) **1.21.10–1.21.11** --- ``` Contact & Feedback: maevius669@discord ```
